# Support Policy

Thank you for using AnomotionJS! Here are the channels to get help, ask questions, request features, or support the creator.

---

## 1. Questions and Discussions

If you need help configuring an animation, integrating into a specific framework, or want to discuss design ideas:
- Please open a discussion or ask questions on our GitHub repository.
- Avoid using the issue tracker for how-to questions.

---

## 2. Reporting Bugs & Issues

If you encounter a rendering bug or error in the engine:
- Check the [Troubleshooting Guide](https://anomotionjs.vercel.app/guide/troubleshooting.html) to see if it is a known setup issue.
- Open a GitHub issue using our provided bug report templates.
- Please include a reproducible code snippet or a link to a CodePen sandbox showing the problem.

---

## 3. Requesting Features

To suggest new presets, rendering hooks, or modules:
- Open a GitHub feature request issue describing the use case and proposed implementation details.

---

## 4. Support the Creator

AnomotionJS is created and maintained by **Eldrex Delos Reyes Bula**. If you find this engine helpful, consider supporting the development through these channels (both channels support Eldrex Bula directly):

- **PayPal:** [Support Eldrex Bula via PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/eldrexbula)
- **Ko-fi:** [Support Eldrex Bula on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/landecsorg/)
- **GitHub Star:** Give our repository a star on [GitHub](https://github.com/EldrexDelosReyesBula/AnomotionJS)!
